docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT CARNEY, KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARNEY, KAREN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $10.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,510.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFT. RETURNED FORD WARDING EXPIRED.
